dashboard.reconciled: Reconciled — True Shop Value matches seed capital + retained profit.
dashboard.drift: Reconciliation drift: {{amount}}. Something doesn't add up.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, id, or phone…
contacts.loadError: Could not load contacts. Try again in a moment.
contacts.name: Name
contacts.statementError: Could not load the running statement.
contacts.noStatement: No activity yet for this farmer.
contacts.settlement: Settlement cascade (ADR-0008): debt repaid {{debt}} · held surplus {{surplus}}

trade.title: New Trade
trade.previewNote: Preview only — the shop recomputes the final bill.
trade.lightBag: light/wet — 0 payable, still counts for bag charges
trade.houseNote: Stock lands in the Godown at cost, no commission.
trade.submitError: Could not submit this trade. Check the buyers, contractor, bag counts, and rates.

advance.title: Issue Advance
advance.insufficientCash: Not enough cash in Rokar to cover this advance — Rokar can never go negative.
advance.error: Could not post the advance. Check the farmer and amount.

payment.title: Record Payment
payment.intro: Rokar-only settle-up actions (ADR-0019): each moves physical cash and can never drive Rokar negative.
payment.buyerHint: Rokar up, buyer settled to zero.
payment.buyerNoReceivable: This buyer has no outstanding receivable to pay.
payment.buyerError: Could not record the buyer payment.
payment.withdrawInsufficient: Not enough cash in Rokar to cover this withdrawal.
payment.payoutHint: Rokar down, contractor settled to zero.
payment.payoutInsufficient: Not enough cash in Rokar to cover this payout.
payment.noCash: No cash has moved through Rokar yet.
payment.cashBookError: Could not load the Rokar cash book.

bardana.title: Bardana Tracker
bardana.intro: Empty bags lent to farmers. Lending debits the farmer (they owe the bag value back); returning credits them.
bardana.lendError: Could not lend bags. Check the farmer and bag count.
bardana.noLoan: This farmer has no outstanding bardana loan.
bardana.tooMany: Cannot return more bags than are outstanding.
bardana.listError: Could not load outstanding bardana loans.

genesis.title: Genesis — Opening Balances
genesis.intro: One-time only. Enter the shop's real starting position — opening cash and any pre-existing farmer, buyer, and contractor balances — posted as one dated entry. Add the contacts on the Contacts screen first, then set their opening balance here.
genesis.farmersHint: Negative = farmer owes the shop. Positive = shop owes the farmer.
genesis.buyersHint: Negative = buyer owes on a won lot.
genesis.contractorsHint: Positive = wages owed to the contractor.
genesis.already: Genesis has already been run for this shop. Correct a mistake with an adjusting entry, not by rewriting genesis.
genesis.needBalance: Enter at least one non-zero opening balance.
genesis.error: Could not post the genesis entry.

ledgers.title: Ledgers
ledgers.noAccounts: No accounts yet in this ledger.
ledgers.noEntries: No entries have touched this account yet.

users.title: Users
users.name: Name
users.createError: Could not create user — the username may already be taken.

config.title: Shop Defaults
config.saveError: Could not save shop defaults. Only an Owner can change them.

cess.title: Cess / Government
cess.loadError: Could not load the cess balance.
cess.insufficientCash: Not enough cash in Rokar to remit this cess — Rokar can never go negative.
cess.noCess: There is no cess held right now.
cess.ownerOnly: Only an Owner can remit cess.

godown.title: Godown
godown.intro: Own-trading stock bought as the internal house buyer (ADR-0005), valued at running average cost — to buy stock in, start a New Trade and sell the lot to buyer id "house".
godown.empty: No stock currently held in the Godown.
godown.resaleHint: COGS is charged at the running average cost/kg; the difference from the sale proceeds books to revenue as trading profit — reported separately from commission (ADR-0005).
godown.tooMuch: Cannot sell more stock (bags or net kg) than the Godown holds.
godown.resaleError: Could not record the resale. Check the buyer id and amounts.

corrections.title: Corrections & Audit Log
corrections.intro: An edit or delete never rewrites a posting — it appends a reversal (and, for an edit, a fresh corrected entry). Editing a settled entry (cess remitted, contractor paid, buyer cleared) warns and is Owner-only; the change is still logged.
corrections.lookupTitle: Look up an entry to correct
corrections.editForbidden: Only an Owner may edit a settled entry.
corrections.deleteForbidden: Only an Owner may delete a settled entry.
corrections.logError: Could not load the change log.
corrections.empty: No corrections have been made yet.

offline.queued: Saved — will sync when back online.
offline.needsConnection: This action needs a live connection — it can't be done offline.

sync.title: Sync
sync.authExpired: Your session expired while offline. Sign in again to resume syncing.
sync.reasonRequired: Enter a reason to discard this item.
sync.loadError: Could not read the offline queue.

state.error: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.
